summary: Tested Play Again functionality for TeacherHubPro Educational Games. All 5 test criteria PASSED: 1) True/False game (2 questions) rotates questions correctly on each Play Again, 2) Quiz game (5 questions) generates completely new AI questions on Play Again, 3) Session ID changes on every Play Again, 4) Questions Hash changes on every Play Again, 5) Rotation works consistently (R1→R2→R3 all different for consecutive rounds).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Play Again functionality is fully working. Two variation mechanisms implemented: 1) AI Regeneration for games with original_content (Quiz game), 2) Rotation-based variation for small question sets (True/False game with 2 questions). Key functions in PlayGame.js: generateSessionId() (line 17), hashQuestions() (lines 19-31), createQuestionVariation() (lines 264-308), resetGame() (lines 310-418).

verification.hash_changes_consecutive: PASS - R1→R2 and R2→R3 have different hashes
verification.questions_rotate: PASS - R1 and R2 show different first questions
verification.rotation_pattern: PASS - With 2 questions, R1 and R3 have same first question (expected for rotation by playCount % 2)

round1.first_question: María tiene un jardín cuadrado de 4 metros por lado. ¿Cuántos metros cuadrados tiene su jardín?

round2.first_question: María tiene 4 cajas y en cada caja hay 4 pelotas. ¿Cuántas pelotas tiene en total?

verification.questions_different: PASS - Completely different word problems (garden → boxes with balls)
verification.ai_regeneration: PASS - Console shows 'regenerated: true' and 'New questions generated successfully'

toast_notifications_observed: ¡Nuevas preguntas generadas por IA! (New AI-generated questions!) - for Quiz game
